svg.text: Bicycle Registration Tag — Vendor Specification Sheet
Finished size: 33mm W x 42mm H (1.3" x 1.65")
Die-cut individual stickers on release liner
QR modules: Black on white field
QR code size: 25mm x 25mm centered on sticker
Quiet zone: minimum 4 modules white border
Each sticker gets a UNIQUE QR code with its tag number.
Cast vinyl, 2 mil, white gloss face
Cast vinyl required — conforms to curved bike tubes, no shrink/crack
MATTE required — gloss causes glare that prevents QR scanning in sunlight
Removable — must not damage paint/clear coat on carbon fiber or aluminum frames
Digital eco-solvent or UV inkjet, 720 DPI min
Flood white base + purple + separate white text pass. PMS 2685 C match.
3-5 year outdoor life, salt air / UV / rain rated
Coastal environment (oceanfront NJ). QR must remain scannable after exposure.
Each sticker has a unique QR code — this is NOT a single-design repeat run.
1. Each sticker requires a UNIQUE QR code encoding "WM-BK-NNNN" where NNNN increments (0001, 0002, ... 0200).
2. The human-readable tag number below the QR code must match the number encoded in the QR.
3. QR codes must be tested for scannability AFTER lamination. Provide test sheet before full production.
4. Matte laminate is mandatory — gloss laminate will cause scanning failures in outdoor sunlight.
5. Application surface: bicycle frame tubes (aluminum, steel, carbon fiber, painted). Prep: IPA wipe.
6. Do NOT substitute calendered vinyl — it will not conform to curved tube surfaces and will edge-lift.
Wharfside Manor Condominium Association — Monmouth Beach, NJ — 2026
